    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    Budget
    Represents a budget assigned to a specific user and category.
    BudgetController
    Controller class responsible for handling budget-related requests and delegating them to the BudgetService.
    BudgetService
    Service class responsible for managing user budgets.
    BudgetUI
    UI screen responsible for creating and managing user budgets.
    FileDatabase
    Utility class responsible for handling basic file-based data storage operations.
    Goal
    Represents a financial or personal goal for a user.
    GoalController
    Controller class responsible for handling goal-related requests and delegating them to the GoalService.
    GoalService
    Service class responsible for managing user financial goals.
    GoalUI
    User Interface class responsible for creating and managing the goal creation screen.
    Income
    Represents an income entry for a user.
    LoginUI
    User Interface class responsible for handling user authentication.
    Main
    Main application class that starts the JavaFX program.
    MainMenu
     
    ReportController
    Controller class responsible for handling report-related requests and delegating them to the ReportService.
    ReportService
    Service class responsible for generating financial reports for users.
    ReportUI
    User Interface class responsible for displaying financial reports.
    Transaction
    Represents a financial transaction for a user.
    TransactionController
    Controller class responsible for handling transaction-related requests and delegating them to the TransactionService.
    TransactionService
    Service class responsible for handling user transactions.
    TransactionUI
    User Interface class responsible for handling transaction input.
    User
    Represents a system user with basic financial and authentication information.
    UserController
    Controller class responsible for handling user-related requests such as signup, login, and budget updates.
    UserService
    Service class responsible for user management operations such as signup, login, and budget-related updates.
